response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and any demonstrated exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains, despite having broad full-stack and open-source experience in non-financial technologies like DLang, Node.js, and GIS platforms.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong contributions to open-source projects and developer tooling
Proven ability to work in CI/CD and test-driven environments
concerns: No evidence of C++ development on Windows platform as required
No domain experience in fixed income, capital markets, or banking systems
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in financial data systems
